title: Hugo's Colorful Snacks
synopsis: Baby Hugo discovers bright colors through his favorite snacks, exploring red strawberries, yellow bananas, green peas, and orange carrots in a joyful sensory adventure.

pages.text: Hugo loves snacks! Look at all the pretty colors.

illustration.description: A joyful baby Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes sits in a high chair surrounded by rainbow-colored food splashes and paint drips in a finger paint aesthetic with vibrant red as the dominant color
illustration.alt: Baby Hugo in high chair with colorful food around him

pages.text: Red strawberries! Sweet and yummy. Hugo takes a big bite. Mmm!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes holding a bright red strawberry with red paint splatters and drips everywhere, sensory visual with joyful pure red color dominating the splashy painterly scene
illustration.alt: Hugo eating a red strawberry with red paint splashes

pages.text: Yellow bananas! So soft and sweet. Hugo smiles and claps his hands.

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes clapping with yellow banana pieces and bright yellow paint splatter drips creating a joyful finger paint aesthetic with yellow as the dominant color
illustration.alt: Hugo clapping with yellow bananas and yellow paint

pages.text: Green peas roll around Hugo's plate. Pop, pop, pop in his mouth!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes playing with green peas on his plate, surrounded by splashy painterly green paint drips and splatters in a sensory visual with green as the dominant color
illustration.alt: Hugo playing with green peas and green paint splashes

pages.text: Orange carrots crunch! Hugo's favorite orange snack makes him giggle.

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes giggling while holding orange carrot sticks, with vibrant orange paint splatter drips and finger paint aesthetic creating a joyful pure color experience with orange dominating
illustration.alt: Hugo giggling with orange carrots and orange paint

pages.text: Hugo loves his colorful snacks! Red, yellow, green, orange. All so good!

illustration.description: Hugo with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes surrounded by all his colorful snacks with rainbow colors splashing together in paint drips and splatters, creating a sensory visual finger paint aesthetic with all colors mixing joyfully
illustration.alt: Hugo with all his colorful snacks and rainbow paint

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color are Hugo's strawberries?
questions.explanation: Hugo's strawberries are red! Red is a bright, happy color.

questions.question: What orange snack does Hugo eat?
questions.explanation: Hugo eats orange carrots! They crunch and make him giggle.

questions.question: How does Hugo feel about his colorful snacks?
questions.explanation: Hugo is happy! He loves all his colorful, yummy snacks.
